chunks.text: Blog - Page 11 of 11 - EECS at Berkeley Blog September 23, 2016 Looking at the Top in Tech: Virginia Smith Computer Science Ph.D. student, Virginia Smith, started out in a field where there were quite a lot women. As an undergraduate, she studied math, a field where there are almost equal numbers of men and women. Smith finished all of her required math courses in her first two years as... August 16, 2016 Fall ’16 Alumni Spotlight: Diane Greene Diane B. Greene (M.S. CS 1988) is ranked #1 of the 26 most powerful female engineers in 2016 by Business Insider.
